creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
Repocopy request for security/nessus:

  security/nessus           -> security/nessus-devel
  security/nessus-libnasl   -> security/nessus-libnasl-devel
  security/nessus-libraries -> security/nessus-libraries-devel
  security/nessus-plugins   -> security/nessus-plugins-devel

They will be used to track the development branch of the nessus suite.

This is required by existing PR ports/31139.

Thanks!
